episodes.title: Why Hindus Fall For Babas? | Investigating Hindu Godmen
episodes.description:
The moment a BABA IS EXPOSED,  the rationalists start abusing Hinduism: FRAUDS, SUPERSTITIOUS, UNCRITICAL, and whatnot. But do they really understand? 

In this video, I explain "The Godmen Phenomenon' among Hindus, evaluate the criticism hurled at Hinduism from rationalists, atheists, secular Hindus and Abrahamics alike, and give a mechanism to identify such impostors. Do watch the full video to understand 'Why Hindus Fall For Baba Cults?' Investigating Hindu Godmen

Why Hindus Fall For Baba Cults? | Investigating Hindu Godmen
#hindubabas #cults #prateekexpress 

Chapters:

0:00 - Introduction 
1:38 - Are these Fraud Babas Hindu? 
4:44 - Why Criticise Hinduism For These Babas
6:16: How To Distinguish Hindu Saints From Cults
9:30 - Conclusion
